name: Cackling Straitjacket
description: Notes Although it is not labeled in the description compared to the other effects, the +3 stat boost to non HP/MP stats are not collective, as each one has an indivudual chance to be boosted instead of getting +3 to all.
effects: Generalized Insanity: On shoot, 1% chance to be inflicted with any of the following effects for 3s Generalized Insanity Effects: HP Boost (+30 HP) or MP Boost (+30 MP) ATT Boost (+3 ATT), DEF Boost (+3 DEF), DEX Boost (+3 DEX), VIT Boost (+3 VIT), WIS Boost (+3 WIS) Healing or Hexed on self
